name: @ivanheral/vite-plugin-angular
description: Vite plugin to inline Angular templateUrl and styleUrls, compile Angular decorators, and apply the Angular Linker.

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run test
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && git push && git push --tags && npm publish
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && git push && git push --tags && npm publish
scripts.release:major: npm version major && git push && git push --tags && npm publish

author: Iván Hernández Alvarez
